name: Set Matrix Zeroes
description: Given an m x n integer matrix, if an element is 0, set its entire row and column to 0's. You must do it in place. Try to solve it using O(1) extra space by using the first row and first column as markers.
constraints: m == matrix.length. n == matrix[0].length. 1 <= m, n <= 200. -2^31 <= matrix[i][j] <= 2^31 - 1.
python_template:

performance.stress_intent: focus on row/column propagation correctness with dense zero patterns; matrix bounds are modest for hard timing separation
